step_by_step_thinking: Postherpetic Neuralgia (PHN) is characterized by persistent pain that persists after the rash from shingles has resolved. The definition typically refers to pain persisting for more than one month post-herpes zoster onset, which aligns with common clinical definitions used in diagnosis.
raw_response:
Postherpetic Neuralgia (PHN) is characterized by persistent pain that persists after the rash from shingles has resolved. The definition typically refers to pain persisting for more than one month post-herpes zoster onset, which aligns with common clinical definitions used in diagnosis.
